plugins.cameraPermission: HouseMates uses your camera so you can snap photos of receipts, damage, and house memories to share with your housemates.
plugins.photosPermission: HouseMates needs access to your photo library so you can pick photos of receipts, damage, and memories to share with your housemates.
HouseMates needs access to save house photos to your library.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: HouseMates needs permission to save photos to your device.

plugins.calendarPermission: HouseMates needs calendar access to add house events and parking reservations to your calendar.
plugins.remindersPermission: HouseMates needs reminders access to set due date reminders.
